title: Graphic Defacement
description: Ce style juxtapose des techniques classiques de peinture à l'huile hyperréaliste avec des interventions graphiques contemporaines et saisissantes. Une sous-couche peinte, aux tons sourds et très détaillée, est délibérément recouverte et abstraite par d'épaisses lignes vectorielles de couleur fluo, plates et uniformes, qui tracent et simplifient les contours clés. La tension entre le réalisme volumétrique de la couche de base et le trait purement bidimensionnel et opaque crée un effet de vandalisme surréaliste aux accents pop-art.
description_en: This style juxtaposes classical, hyper-realistic oil painting techniques with stark, contemporary graphic interventions. A muted, highly detailed under-painting is deliberately overlaid and abstracted by thick, flat, unvarying neon-colored vector lines that trace and simplify key contours. The tension between the volumetric realism of the base layer and the purely two-dimensional, opaque line art creates a surreal, pop-art infused defacement effect.
description_fr: Ce style juxtapose des techniques classiques de peinture à l'huile hyperréaliste avec des interventions graphiques contemporaines et saisissantes. Une sous-couche peinte, aux tons sourds et très détaillée, est délibérément recouverte et abstraite par d'épaisses lignes vectorielles de couleur fluo, plates et uniformes, qui tracent et simplifient les contours clés. La tension entre le réalisme volumétrique de la couche de base et le trait purement bidimensionnel et opaque crée un effet de vandalisme surréaliste aux accents pop-art.
prompt: Mixed media artwork combining hyper-realistic traditional oil painting with stark, flat graphic line overlays. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The base layer must be rendered as a highly detailed, volumetric fine art painting exhibiting subtle studio lighting, smooth brushwork, realistic textures, and muted, somber values using subtle {{secondary_color}} tones for ambient shading. Directly superimposed over this classical, fully rendered under-painting is a disruptive layer of extremely thick, opaque, unvarying contour lines in a glaring {{primary_color}}. These bold, two-dimensional graphic lines act as a surreal defacement, tracing, outlining, and radically simplifying the primary structural features of the {{subject}}. The overlay lines possess zero pressure sensitivity, zero shading, and razor-sharp edges, resembling thick vinyl tape or solid digital vector strokes applied flatly against the dimensional painting. The background features a dark, moody, atmospheric gradient in deep {{accent_color}} hues, allowing the intensely saturated {{primary_color}} line art to pop aggressively forward. The visual tension relies entirely on the stark contrast between classical, meticulously blended realism and flat, irreverent pop-art abstraction. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. mixed media, hyper-realism, pop-art defacement, thick vector outlines, graphic overlay, juxtaposition, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

Directly superimposed over this classical, fully rendered under-painting is a disruptive layer of extremely thick, opaque, unvarying contour lines in a glaring {{primary_color}}. The visual tension relies entirely on the stark contrast between classical, meticulously blended realism and flat, irreverent pop-art abstraction. mixed media, hyper-realism, pop-art defacement, thick vector outlines, graphic overlay, juxtaposition
background_prompt: A moody, classical oil-painted atmospheric environment, rendered with highly detailed, volumetric brushwork and subtle studio lighting. The scene features deep, somber gradients and soft realism in {{secondary_color}} and {{accent_color}} tones. Overlaid across this traditional, meticulously blended landscape are thick, flat, opaque, unvarying contour lines in a stark {{primary_color}}. These bold graphic lines trace and abstract the environmental topography, creating a surreal juxtaposition between classical depth and flat, two-dimensional pop-art defacement.
background_prompt_removebg: A moody, classical oil-painted atmospheric environment, rendered with highly detailed, volumetric brushwork and subtle studio lighting. The scene features deep, somber gradients and soft realism in {{secondary_color}} and {{accent_color}} tones. Overlaid across this traditional, meticulously blended landscape are thick, flat, opaque, unvarying contour lines in a stark {{primary_color}}. These bold graphic lines trace and abstract the environmental topography, creating a surreal juxtaposition between classical depth and flat, two-dimensional pop-art defacement. Placed in the foreground is a thick, geometric ornamental border made of the same flat {{primary_color}} vector-style lines, creating depth in front of the invisible subject. The painted environment and the graphic frame transition cleanly into a flat {{background_color}} surface.
